title: dianthus glutinosus
intro: Dianthus glutinosus, also known as sticky pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family, characterized by its fragrant, pink flowers and sticky, glandular leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Dianthus glutinosus are attributed to its ability to soothe and calm the skin, making it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and minor irritations. Herbal preparations of Dianthus glutinosus can be made into infusions, ointments, or salves, allowing for topical application to reap its medicinal benefits.
